title: Backend / Platform Engineer (AI Systems)
company_focus:
Outsourced digital services and customer experience for tech
companies
description:
About TaskUs: TaskUs is a provider of outsourced digital
services and next-generation customer experience to fast-
growing technology companies, helping its clients represent,
protect and grow their brands. Leveraging a cloud-based
infrastructure, TaskUs serves clients in the fastest-growing
sectors, including social media, e-commerce, gaming,
streaming media, food delivery, ride-sharing, HiTech,
FinTech, and HealthTech.

The People First culture at TaskUs has enabled the company
to expand its workforce to approximately 45,000 employees
globally. Presently, we have a presence in twenty-three
locations across twelve countries, which include the
Philippines, India, and the United States.

It started with one ridiculously good idea to create a
different breed of Business Processing Outsourcing (BPO)! We
at TaskUs understand that achieving growth for our partners
requires a culture of constant motion, exploring new
technologies, being ready to handle any challenge at a
moment’s notice, and mastering consistency in an ever-
changing world.

What We Offer: At TaskUs, we prioritize our employees' well-
being by offering competitive industry salaries and
comprehensive benefits packages. Our commitment to a People
First culture is reflected in the various departments we
have established, including Total Rewards, Wellness, HR, and
Diversity. We take pride in our inclusive environment and
positive impact on the community. Moreover, we actively
encourage internal mobility and professional growth at all
stages of an employee's career within TaskUs. Join our team
today and experience firsthand our dedication to supporting
People First.

Role: Backend / Platform Engineer (AI Systems) Experience:
3–8 years

About the Role

You will build the core platform services and APIs that
power AI workflows, integrations, and enterprise
deployments.

Responsibilities

- Design and build scalable backend services and APIs
- Develop microservices for QA workflows, scoring, and
  insights delivery
- Integrate with internal and external systems (CRM, contact
  center, etc.)
- Build orchestration layers for AI workflows
- Ensure system performance, reliability, and scalability
- Collaborate with AI and data teams for seamless integration

Required Skills

- Strong backend development (Python, Node.js, or Java)
- Experience building REST/gRPC APIs
- Familiarity with microservices architecture
- Experience with AWS (Lambda, ECS/EKS, API Gateway)
- Understanding of system design and distributed systems

Nice to Have

- Experience with event-driven systems (Kafka, SNS/SQS)
- Exposure to AI/ML system integration
- Knowledge of multi-cloud architectures

Impact

You will build the scalable foundation that connects AI
capabilities to real-world applications.

How We Partner To Protect You: TaskUs will neither solicit
money from you during your application process nor require
any form of payment in order to proceed with your
application. Kindly ensure that you are always in
communication with only authorized recruiters of TaskUs.

DEI: In TaskUs we believe that innovation and higher
performance are brought by people from all walks of life. We
welcome applicants of different backgrounds, demographics,
and circumstances. Inclusive and equitable practices are our
responsibility as a business. TaskUs is committed to
providing equal access to opportunities. If you need
reasonable accommodations in any part of the hiring process,
please let us know.

We invite you to explore all TaskUs career opportunities and
apply through the provided URL
https://www.taskus.com/careers/.
responsibilities: Design and build scalable backend services and APIs
Develop microservices for QA workflows, scoring, and insights delivery
Integrate with internal and external systems (CRM, contact center, etc.)
Build orchestration layers for AI workflows
Ensure system performance, reliability, and scalability
Collaborate with AI and data teams for seamless integration
use_cases: AI workflow orchestration for enterprise deployments
Integration layer connecting AI capabilities to CRM and contact center systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role builds backend platform services and APIs that
power AI workflows, but does not involve directly building,
training, fine-tuning, or deploying AI/ML models. The
engineer creates the infrastructure and orchestration layers
that connect AI capabilities to applications, which is
enabling/support work for AI systems rather than hands-on
AI/ML work.
